name: Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc.
business: Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. develops and commercializes medications for dermatologic diseases, including skin cancers. Its only approved product is YCANTH (VP-102) for molluscum contagiosum, and it is developing VP-102 for common warts and VP-315 for basal cell carcinoma. The company sells to pediatric dermatologists, dermatologists, pediatricians, and primary care HCPs through a specialized sales force.
sellsTo: select other primary care healthcare providers
namedSuppliers: Funing County Development Brucea Javanica Professional Cooperatives

exposures.sentence: We are a therapeutics company developing and commercializing medications for the treatment of dermatologic diseases, including skin cancers.

catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to expand the field sales force to 50 employee sales representatives.
On February 9, 2026, Torii announced the launch of YCANTH in Japan as a new treatment option for molluscum in children over 2 years of age.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable U.S. market for molluscum over $1 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Accordingly, we estimate this represents a total addressable U.S. market of over $1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable U.S. market for common warts over $1 billion
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate approximately 22 million people in the United States have common warts, and the total addressable U.S. market to be over $1 billion with an estimated two million patient visits for common warts each year.

tamClaims.claim: Global BCC market $6.7 billion in 2021, expected to grow to $11.5 billion in 2028
tamClaims.sentence: In 2021, the estimated global BCC market was $6.7 billion, which is expected to grow to $11.5 billion in 2028.
